_comment: Mutation testing for the engine + store contract surface. Coverage % proves lines executed; this proves tests detect mutations. Baseline 2026-05-06 lifted from 72.77% to 94.20% after a four-commit pass that hardened useCombatStore (27→94), useGameStore (60→86), engine actions (86→96), ai (84→98), rules (95→99), and color (83→90). Remaining survivors are mostly equivalent mutants (process.env.NODE_ENV check, default-clock arrow) and color-label literals. Floor break=90 absorbs noise but trips on real regression. Not wired into npm run ci — full run is multi-minute; on-demand via npm run test:mutation.
